title: Email automation to multiple people
excerpt: Hi, i would love to be able to send an email to mulitple people in one email. i.e. when an item gets to design stage it sends and email to sales, project management and design notifying such.

posts.author: bjmensink (Ben Mensink)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, i would love to be able to send an email to mulitple people in one email. i.e. when an item gets to design stage it sends and email to sales, project management and design notifying such.
